usage.headings: Use Manrope for all section titles and key metrics. Keep letter-spacing tight.
usage.body: Use Inter for all long-form text, inputs, and logs. High legibility is key.
usage.labels: Use Uppercase with wide tracking for tiny labels (e.g., 'DATE', 'BREED').

colors.rules: Avoid gradients for backgrounds. Use solid soft colors. Use Primary color sparingly for CTAs.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the Dashboard background if possible, but keep it clean.

layout.grid_strategy: Mobile-first single column. On Desktop, use a 'Bento' grid for the dashboard (Sidebar + Main Content + Right Widget).
layout.mobile_nav: Bottom sticky navigation bar for mobile.
layout.desktop_nav: Top clean header or Left minimal sidebar.

motion.interactions: Scale down slightly on click (scale-95). Hover lifts slightly (-y-1).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Slate-700 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#568EA3] text-white hover:bg-[#4a7c8f] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6

inputs.default: bg-slate-50 border-transparent focus:border-[#568EA3] focus:bg-white rounded-xl h-12 px-4 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion date-fns recharts react-day-picker' immediately.
THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (brand-primary, brand-secondary, etc.) and fonts.
FONTS: Import 'Manrope' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css.
LAYOUT: Create a responsive 'Shell' component that handles the Mobile Bottom Nav vs Desktop Top Nav logic.
LOGGING FLOW: This is the core MVP feature. It must be FAST. Use large tappable 'Mood Cards' instead of dropdowns. Avoid standard form fatigue.
INSIGHTS: Use simple LineCharts (Recharts) for trends. Don't overcomplicate the data viz. Keep it 'glanceable'.
TONE: Ensure all copy is reassuring. 'You're doing great', 'Here is this week's summary'.
TESTING: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards).
universal_guidelines: Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
